name: metro-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Metro — live JSON stream of Telegram + Discord messages for local Claude Code / Codex sessions.

scripts.madge: madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx apps/app/app apps/app/components apps/app/lib apps/app/modules apps/api/src packages/client/src packages/kit/src packages/metro/src
scripts.check: turbo run lint typecheck && bun run madge && bun run knip
